memories.content: Tobias is working on a new AI project, named 'myai'. He aims to integrate speech-to-text and text-to-speech capabilities.
Added a Google search function tool to the 'myai' AI project to enhance information gathering and capabilities.
Tobias wants to use Whisper as the speech-to-text model for his project 'myai'.

User decided to use Google Text-to-Speech for TTS due to its high-quality neural voices, wide language support, and easy integration. They chose to pair it with OpenAI Whisper for speech-to-text to leverage the best of both services. The decision was based on the combined quality, features, and compatibility of these tools for their needs.
Tobias used to make YouTube videos, now enjoys coding and occasionally doing music production.

Updated project info: The AI project 'myai' has completed integration of both the Google search functionality and the Whisper speech-to-text functionality, along with Google Text-to-Speech for neural voices and wide language support.
Updated project status: Google search functionality and Whisper speech-to-text functionality are finished. Google Text-to-Speech functionality is not finished yet.

Steps to set up Google Text-to-Speech (TTS): 1. Create a Google Cloud account and enable the Text-to-Speech API. 2. Set up a billing account (required even for free tier). 3. Create credentials (API key or service account). 4. Use client libraries or REST API to convert text to audio. 5. Configure voice settings (language, gender, voice type).

Step-by-step guide to set up Google Cloud Text-to-Speech API:
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/ and log in.
2. Create a new project via project dropdown > NEW PROJECT.
3. Open hamburger menu > APIs & Services > Library.
4. Search and enable Cloud Text-to-Speech API.
5. Go to APIs & Services > Credentials.
6. Create credentials > Service account.
7. Name it and finish creation.
8. In the service account, add a JSON key and download it.
9. Use this key in your app for authentication.
10. Optionally set up billing under hamburger menu > Billing.
These instructions saved for future reference.
The voice named Enceladus is Tobias's favorite because it is the most similar to Jarvis from the Iron Man movies.
The Google Text-to-Speech functionality in the 'myai' project is complete.
Updated Tobias's favorite voice for the text-to-speech feature to the Arch Rachernar. This is the current voice being used for the AI assistant.
Updated the favorite voice for the text-to-speech feature to 'Achernar.' This voice belongs to the AI model named Samantha, not Tobias, the user.
